properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v4 v6 v7 v3 v4 v3 v4 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You hear me when I call You are my morning song Though darkness fills the night It cannot hide the light Whom shall I fear?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You crush the enemy Underneath my feet You are my sword and shield Though troubles linger still Whom shall I fear?

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I know who goes before me I know who stands behind The God of angel armies Is always by my side

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The one who reigns forever He is a friend of mine The God of angel armies Is always by my side

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: My strength is in your name For you alone can save You will deliver me Yours is the victory Whom shall I fear? Whom shall I fear?

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And nothing formed against me shall stand You hold the whole world in your hands I'm holding on to your promises You are faithful You are faithful

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Nothing formed against me shall stand You hold the whole world in your hands I'm holding on to your promises You are faithful You are faithful You are faithful

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: The God of angel armies Is always by my side
